revision.text:
The '''Osaka Temmangu Shrine''' is a [[Shinto]] shrine founded in AD [[949]] in [[Osaka]]. The Tenjin Festival is held here annually.
==Reference== *[http://www.octb.jp/english/search/detail.cgi?id=02578&func=course&cls0=false&cls1=1&cls2=6 Osaka Convention & Tourism Bureau - Osaka Temmangu Shrine]
[[Category:949 establishments]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]]
{{reli-struct-stub}} {{japan-struct-stub}}

The '''Osaka Temmangu Shrine''' is a [[Shinto]] shrine founded in AD [[949]] in [[Osaka]]. The Tenjin Festival is held here annually.
==The nearest stations== *[[Osaka-Temmangu Station]] on the [[West Japan Railway Company]] (JR West) [[JR Tozai Line]] *[[Minami-morimachi Station]] on the two lines of [[Osaka Municipal Subway]].

revision.comment: removed [[Category:Osaka]]; added [[Category:Buildings and structures in Osaka]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
Gryffindor moved page [[Ōsaka Tenmangū Shrine]] to [[Ōsaka Tenman-gū]]
AWB general fixes and delink dates per [[:WP:DATELINK]], [[:WP:YEARLINK]] and [[:MOS:UNLINKYEARS]] using [[Project:AWB|AWB]] (8267)
[[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 4 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q385793]] ([[User talk:Addbot|Report Errors]])
Bot: Migrating 1 langlinks, now provided by Wikidata on [[d:Q385793]]
+[[Category:10th-century establishments in Japan]]; ±[[Category:949 establishments]]→[[Category:949 establishments in Asia]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
Robot - Speedily moving category Visitor attractions in Osaka to [[:Category:Tourist attractions in Osaka]] per [[WP:CFDS|CFDS]].
Dekimasu moved page [[Ōsaka Tenman-gū]] to [[Osaka Tenman-gū]]: standard romanization for "Osaka" on Wikipedia
Robot - Moving category 949 establishments in Asia to [[:Category:949 establishments]] per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2018 February 7]].

Hijiri88 moved page [[Osaka Tenman-gū]] to [[Osaka Tenmangū]]: See [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Japan-related articles#Temples and shrines]]. Also it's undoubtedly the more common spelling outside Wikipedia, although [[WP:COMMONNAME]] certainly doesn't apply.

{{Short description|Shinto shrine in Osaka Prefecture, Japan}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Osaka Tenmangū Shrine'''|大阪天満宮|Ōsaka Tenmangū}} | image = Osaka Tenmangu01n3390.jpg | caption = Osaka Temmangu Shrine's ''[[honden]]'' and ''haiden'' | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|34|41|45.69|N|135|30|45.43|E|region:JP-27_scale:10000|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} The {{nihongo|'''Osaka Tenmangū Shrine'''|大阪天満宮|Ōsaka Tenmangū}} is a [[Shinto shrine]] and one of [[Tenmangū]] founded in AD 949 in [[Osaka]]. The [[Tenjin Festival]] is held here annually from 24 July to 25 July.
==Nearest stations== *[[Ōsakatemmangū Station]] on the [[West Japan Railway Company]] (JR West) [[JR Tōzai Line]] *[[Minami-morimachi Station]] on the two lines of [[Osaka Municipal Subway]]. {{Short description|Shinto shrine in Osaka Prefecture, Japan}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Osaka Tenmangū Shrine'''|大阪天満宮|Ōsaka Tenmangū}} | image = Osaka Tenmangu01n3390.jpg | caption = Osaka Temmangu Shrine's ''[[honden]]'' and ''haiden'' | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|34|41|45.69|N|135|30|45.43|E|region:JP-27_scale:10000|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} The {{nihongo|'''Osaka Tenmangū Shrine'''|大阪天満宮|Ōsaka Tenmangū}} is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} and one of [[Tenmangū]] founded in AD 949 in {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|WD=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}. The [[Tenjin Festival]] is held here annually from 24 July to 25 July.
==Nearest stations== *{{ill|Ōsakatemmangū Station|en|Ōsakatemmangū Station|WD=Q1073324|lt=Ōsakatemmangū Station|1=Ōsakatemmangū Station}} on the {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=West Japan Railway Company|1=West Japan Railway Company}} (JR West) {{ill|JR Tōzai Line|en|JR Tōzai Line|WD=Q1072835|lt=JR Tōzai Line|1=JR Tōzai Line}} *{{ill|Minami-morimachi Station|en|Minami-morimachi Station|WD=Q1039923|lt=Minami-morimachi Station|1=Minami-morimachi Station}} on the two lines of {{ill|Osaka Municipal Subway|en|Osaka Municipal Subway|WD=Q303026|lt=Osaka Municipal Subway|1=Osaka Metro}}.
==References== {{Commons+cat|Ōsaka_Tenman-gū|Ōsaka_Tenman-gū}} *[http://www.tourism.city.osaka.jp/en/search/detail/sightseeing_3152.html Osaka Convention & Tourism Bureau - Osaka Temmangu Shrine]
<!--this was an inappropriate and erroneous transclusion meant to be a bottom bar thing I think but not including--> {{Shinto-stub}} {{japan-religious-struct-stub}}
